notes: 13 available. OUT: Thacher Knight #20, Jon Sorenson, Kyle Doherty, Luke McArdle. John Flinn is HURT today - limited to 3 innings in the field (sits 4), freeing more time for others. Catcher rotates: Coulombe (inn 1/4/7), Bruno (2/5), Cheever (3/6); those three also take right-side OF when not catching, Konen stays in the outfield. Klatt & Joe McLean split the 7 innings 4/3 (Klatt 1-4, Joe 5-7). Perry DiLibero subs at LCF for Amann inning 4. No player sits two innings in a row (Flinn's 4 is the injury exception).

opponent_lineup.source: No 2025 scouting data (Falcons are not in the 2025 opponent dataset).

rules: VALIDATION RULE: Each inning has exactly 10 positions (P,C,1B,2B,3B,SS,LF,LCF,RCF,RF), one player per position. No gaps, no duplicates.
Pitching split 4/3: Eric Klatt pitches innings 1-4, Joe McLean pitches innings 5-7.
Dennis Marks at SS all 7 (only shortstop). Andrew Amann at LCF (rests inning 4 - Perry DiLibero subs at LCF).
Catcher rotates among Bruno, Cheever and Coulombe - nobody catches the whole game; Coulombe also plays right-side OF.
John Flinn is hurt: capped at 3 fielding innings (injury override of the usual 2-sit max). Otherwise no one sits more than twice, Amann & Marks at most once, and NO player sits two innings in a row.
Batting order = on-base/AVG at the top, run producers in the 3-4-5 RBI spots.

grid.why: Leadoff: team-best .727 AVG/OBP, 7 of 8 hits singles - pure table-setter. 1B (sits inn 6).
Two-hole: .706 AVG, 11 singles, elite contact. Pitches innings 1-4; 3B inn 6.
Three-hole: best all-around bat (2.286 OPS, .714 AVG, 11 RBI). LCF; rests inn 4 (Perry subs).
Cleanup: team-high 14 RBI and 4 HR. Best LF; takes LCF inning 4. Plays 6 (sits inn 2).
Five-hole: 14 RBI, 3 HR. Only shortstop, plays all 7 (anchor).
HURT today - limited to 3 fielding innings (LF/1B) to rest the injury. Still bats (2.000 OPS).
.636 AVG, 7 RBI. Pitches innings 5-7; plays 2B otherwise. Sits inn 1, 3.
